description: Synthetic fully-populated owner identity that passes every field-level rule but intentionally conflicts with the current package.json repository URL (your-org/mysql-azure-auth). The validator must therefore emit IDENTITY NOT READY: REPOSITORY_MISMATCH exit 1. All values are synthetic placeholders for verification only; no real owner is asserted. The repositoryUrl below is deliberately not 'your-org/mysql-azure-auth' so the URL-mismatch branch fires.

owner.copyrightHolder: Synthetic Owner For Validator Test Only
